abilities.description: When you must @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death} by being exposed to a life-threatening situation (such as the vacuum of space, high-pressures underwater, or explosion), you may deploy the last-chance bubble. If you do, take an automatic strong hit. When deployed, the bubble is a non-reusable, non-pilotable, incidental vehicle of 3 integrity that forms around you. It provides a communications kit, enough oxygen for up to 24 hours, and cannot be repaired.
The last-chance bubble is pilotable, equipped with micro-rockets capable of limited flight or travel.
The last-chance bubble is reinforced with armor; it has 5 integrity instead of 3.

system.description: A single-use inflatable life-boat deployed when destruction is imminent.
